judge.reason: The primary purpose of _bandwidth_supported is to check for the presence of the 'opp-peak-kBps' property in an OPP table node, returning an integer status (0/1 or error). The only refcount operations (of_node_get) are internal to manage device_node lifetimes via the __free() cleanup pattern, and no reference-counted object is passed or returned to the caller. The refcount management is incidental, not the main function.
